slides.title: The mineral your *immune system runs on*.
slides.sub: Zinc quietly powers immunity, skin repair, and recovery — and a surprising number of people run low.

slides.title: A quiet workhorse
slides.body: Zinc helps run hundreds of enzymes behind *immunity, skin healing*, and muscle recovery.

slides.title: More common than you think
slides.body: Low intake is widespread, and the body *stores very little* — so daily food sources matter.

slides.title: Where to find it
slides.body: Oysters lead by far, then *beef, pumpkin seeds*, chickpeas, and cashews.

slides.title: Demand goes up
slides.body: Hard training, plant-based diets, and illness can raise your needs — *food first*, supplements only if needed.

slides.title: More isn't better
slides.body: Megadoses can backfire and block copper. *Stick to food* and modest amounts.

slides.title: Cover your bases, *feel the difference*.
slides.body: Snap your meals in Vibe Health and your daily Health Score shows whether your nutrition is covering the basics — like zinc-rich foods.

caption:
Zinc quietly runs your immune system, skin repair, and recovery — and a lot of people run low. 🦪

Oysters, beef, pumpkin seeds, chickpeas. Food first, and don't megadose. Save this one. 🔖

Snap your meals in Vibe Health and your daily Health Score shows if you're covering the basics → link in bio.
youtube_title: Zinc: The Mineral Your Immunity Runs On
